name: Saravanakumar Arunachalam

profileSummary.title: Professional Summary
profileSummary.content: Software and platform engineer with 14+ years of experience in cloud-native, microservices, and event-driven systems. Strong hands-on experience with Java, Go, Python, Spring Boot, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, and Helm. Currently a Senior Platform Engineer at GEICO in Charlotte, working in a hybrid setup on Kubernetes-native infrastructure, serverless platforms, AI infrastructure, and production operations. Experienced in observability, CI/CD, GitOps, SRE practices, and building scalable systems with Knative, Istio, KEDA, Kafka, Grafana, and Loki.

skills.title: Backend Development
skills.text: Java, Go, Python, NodeJS, Spring, Microservices, Event-Driven Design, gRPC, Protobuf

skills.title: Cloud & DevOps
skills.text: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Helm, CloudFormation, AWS CDK, Knative, KEDA, Istio, cert-manager, Cloud Foundry (PCF), ECS, EC2, Lambda, SQS, SNS

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.text: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, React.js, Servlets, JSP

skills.title: Databases & Storage
skills.text: Oracle, Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, ElasticSearch, DynamoDB, S3, Distributed Cache

skills.title: Design & Architecture
skills.text: DDD, CQRS, Circuit Breaker, Saga, Distributed Systems, Netflix OSS (Eureka, Hystrix, Feign, Ribbon, Zuul)

skills.title: Development Practices
skills.text: SOLID, TDD, Pair Programming, Agile (Scrum/Kanban), GitOps, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code

skills.title: Observability & Monitoring
skills.text: Grafana, Loki, Splunk, OpenSearch, Telemetry, Monitoring

experiences.title: Senior Platform Engineer

Implemented observability with Grafana, Loki, and telemetry tooling to monitor system health and service reliability
Managed Kubernetes infrastructure with Helm and ArgoCD for declarative GitOps-based continuous delivery
Built and operated Kubernetes-native production workloads, including Knative services, Istio traffic management, KEDA autoscaling, and Kafka pipelines
Developed AI infrastructure for RAG pipelines on Kubernetes, autoscaled inference workloads, and agentic AI patterns
Partnered with product managers and stakeholders to define architecture requirements and technical roadmaps
Owned operational health through on-call support, incident response, and resilience-focused engineering
